title: Croptopia's Chocolaterie
description: A Croptopia Add-on Revolving Around Chocolate Making
body:
### This is a [Croptopia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia-fabric "Croptopia") add-on. --- ### Make a variety of chocolates with different fillings using Croptopia that you already love!
I tried to replicate the chocolate making process with as much fidelity as I can, although I'm still looking for improvements!
All suggestions, issues or any kind of help is welcome on the issue tracker. Enjoy making chocolate! And happy holidays!
